data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第一章前篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] The new main story "Eden Treaty" will start on 1/25 (Tue), Sensei! Are you excited
data.body:
[Update Preview]

The new main story "Eden Treaty" will start on 1/25 (Tue), Sensei!
Are you excited for what what kind of adventure awaits the Trinity General School students?

#BlueArchive
![iwAWFE2KqF4LPoxgc38yvunFZ4Go54SL.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/iwAWFE2KqF4LPoxgc38yvunFZ4Go54SL.jpg)

<!--vol3第一张前篇的更新有两篇推文包含了视觉图的预告，一个包含了更新时间，一个包含了章节名与更新话数。出于留档全面但不能重复的考量，将两张预览图都放入了本时间轴中-->
<!--此预览图出自：twitter.com/EN_BlueArchive/status/1485862499182338049 -->
